definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She sat beside me.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A synonym for 'next to'; at the side of.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A synonym for 'next to'; at the side of.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The key was underneath the mat.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The key was underneath the mat.
definitions.usage_context_en: Situated directly below; a stronger or more formal version of 'under'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Situated directly below; a stronger or more formal version of 'under'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is among friends.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Situated in the middle of a group of three or more (compare 'between').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Situated in the middle of a group of three or more (compare 'between').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The village is beyond those hills.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The village is beyond those hills.
definitions.usage_context_en: At or to the further side of something; past the limits of.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: At or to the further side of something; past the limits of.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: That is beyond my understanding.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to mean 'outside the limits of' (e.g., understanding, belief).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to mean 'outside the limits of' (e.g., understanding, belief).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The ground beneath our feet.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A formal or literary word for 'under' or 'below'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A formal or literary word for 'under' or 'below'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He placed the crown upon his head.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He placed the crown upon his head.
definitions.usage_context_en: A more formal or literary version of 'on'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A more formal or literary version of 'on'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is within the building.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Inside the limits of an area or space.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Inside the limits of an area or space.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I will be back within an hour.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I will be back within an hour.
definitions.usage_context_en: Happening inside a particular period of time.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Happening inside a particular period of time.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It rained throughout the day.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: In every part of a place or object; from beginning to end of an event.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In every part of a place or object; from beginning to end of an event.]
